passage: Climate change is one of the most pressing issues of our time. Scientists widely agree that human activities, such as burning fossil fuels and deforestation, are the primary drivers of rising global temperatures. The consequences are far-reaching: polar ice caps are melting at unprecedented rates, sea levels are rising, and extreme weather events are becoming more frequent. Coral reefs, which are highly sensitive to water temperature changes, are experiencing widespread bleaching. Many species face extinction as their habitats are destroyed. Governments around the world are under pressure to implement stricter environmental policies, but progress has been slow. Individual actions, such as reducing energy consumption and choosing sustainable products, also play a crucial role in addressing this global challenge.

questions.question: According to the passage, what is the primary cause of rising global temperatures?

options.B: Human activities like burning fossil fuels

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT mentioned as a consequence of climate change?
Why are coral reefs experiencing bleaching?

options.D: Lack of sunlight due to air pollution

questions.question: What does the word 'pressing' mean as used in the passage?
What role do individual actions play according to the passage?

options.C: They are a crucial part of addressing the challenge
options.D: They are less important than government policies

questions.question: Which word best describes the pace of government action on climate change according to the passage?
